case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. TIM SCHOEPF

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHOEPF, TIM $1,964.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,009.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,964.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPF, TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 - SERVED MAY-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPF, TIM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, JO ANN ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS AGENT FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TIM SCHOEPF. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPF, TIM
